title: AI/ML Engineer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking an experienced AI/ML Engineer to join our team. As an AI/ML Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying machine learning models and algorithms. You will work closely with our data science team to identify business problems and develop solutions.

Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and algorithms
- Collaborate with data scientists to identify business problems and develop solutions
- Work with cross-functional teams to integrate machine learning models into products
- Optimize and improve the performance of existing machine learning models
- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and advancements in AI/ML

Must-have skills:
- Python
- PyTorch
- TensorFlow
- Natural Language Processing
- Cuda
- Git
- Agile
- CI/CD

Nice to have:
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Knowledge of containerization (Docker)
- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools (Prometheus, ELK Stack)
